intro.en: It is dark and cold. Mochi the stray cat jumps up the wall.
intro.zh: Mochi 是一隻沒有家的流浪貓。每天晚上她偷偷溜進奶奶安靜的小院子。今晚月光出來了,她跳上來等。

questions.sentence: It is dark and cold tonight.
Mochi is a stray cat.
Mochi sleeps under the old porch.
questions.explanationZh: Mochi 睡在老屋簷下(under the old porch),屋簷下算外面 outside,不是溫暖的家裡,所以答 Yes。

questions.sentence: Cold rain falls on her thin fur.
She finds shelter wherever she can.
questions.questionEn: Does Mochi always sleep in the same place?
questions.explanationZh: She finds shelter wherever she can(到處找避雨處)= 沒固定的家,所以「總是睡在同一個地方」是錯的,答 No。

questions.sentence: Mochi has no fixed home and sleeps outside every day.
questions.question: What kind of cat is Mochi?
questions.explanationZh: stray = 流浪的(沒有固定家的)。每晚她自己找東西吃。

questions.sentence: Every night she visits Grandma's small yard.
Every night Mochi visits Grandma's small green place by the wall.
questions.question: Where does Mochi go every night?
questions.explanationZh: yard = 院子。每晚她去奶奶家的小院子落腳。

questions.sentence: Tonight she jumps up the low wall.
Tonight Mochi climbs to the top of the low wall.
questions.question: What does Mochi do to get onto the wall?
questions.explanationZh: jumps up = 一躍而上。輕輕一跳就上了矮牆。

questions.sentence: Tonight Mochi jumps up the low wall.
questions.questionEn: Does Mochi climb onto the wall to wait for Grandma?
questions.explanationZh: Mochi 今晚跳上 (jumps up = climb onto) 矮牆,目的是等奶奶說故事,所以答 Yes。

questions.sentence: She waits quietly for Grandma's story.
Mochi waits quietly for Grandma's story.
questions.questionEn: Does Mochi shout loudly to wake Grandma up?
questions.explanationZh: Mochi 安靜地等 (waits quietly) 奶奶說故事,沒有大聲叫,所以答 No。

questions.sentence: After jumping up, Mochi stays on the wall, ears up, eyes on Grandma.
questions.question: What does Mochi do after jumping up?
questions.explanationZh: 她跳上矮牆後安靜地坐著,等奶奶開始說故事。

intro.en: Hana the shiba dog wags his tail. He waits for his best friend.
intro.zh: 奶奶在院子裡養了一隻棕色的柴犬,叫 Hana。每天天黑後他都在牆邊等 Mochi。他們已經是好朋友很久了。

questions.sentence: Hana swings his tail side to side.
questions.question: What movement comes from his tail?
questions.explanationZh: wag = 搖(尾巴)。柴犬看到我來都會搖尾巴。

questions.sentence: Hana's coat is the color of toast.
questions.question: Which color matches Hana?
questions.explanationZh: toast 烤土司是棕色,所以 brown = 棕色。柴犬就是這個顏色。

questions.sentence: We trust each other.
questions.question: What is the bond between Mochi and Hana?
questions.explanationZh: friends = 朋友。互相信任就是好朋友。

questions.sentence: With him near me, nothing can hurt me.
questions.question: Inside, how do I feel near him?
questions.explanationZh: 跟 Hana 一起時感覺安全(safe),不用怕別的動物。

questions.sentence: The old lady on the chair raised him.
questions.question: Who owns Hana?
questions.explanationZh: 是奶奶從小養大的,所以是奶奶的狗。我只是來作客的流浪貓。

questions.sentence: Hana dashes toward where I sit.
questions.question: Toward what place does Hana dash?
questions.explanationZh: 我坐在矮牆上,他衝向牆邊。dash toward = 衝向。

questions.sentence: His eyes light up when I come.
questions.question: Reading his face, how is Hana?
questions.explanationZh: eyes light up = 眼睛發亮 = happy(開心)。柴犬每晚等我來,看到我就笑。

questions.sentence: He gives my paw a gentle tongue touch.
questions.question: Which action does Hana show?
questions.explanationZh: tongue touch = 用舌頭碰 = lick(舔)。狗狗打招呼的方式。

questions.sentence: He sits by the wall after dark, again and again.
questions.question: How often does Hana wait?
questions.explanationZh: after dark, again and again = 每晚都等。柴犬天天在院子等我來。

questions.sentence: His ears prick up at the sound of my paws.
questions.question: How do his ears react?
questions.explanationZh: prick up = 豎起來 = ears go up。他一聽到我就警覺又開心。

questions.sentence: We rest with our shoulders almost touching.
questions.question: How do we sit?
questions.explanationZh: shoulders almost touching = 肩膀靠著 = side by side(並排)。

questions.sentence: He never barks at me.
questions.question: Why does Hana not bark?
questions.explanationZh: 他把我當朋友,所以從不對我叫。

intro.en: Grandma sits in her chair. She opens a thick book and starts a story.
intro.zh: 奶奶坐在她舊舊的木椅上,手裡拿著一本厚厚的棕色書。她每晚對 Mochi 和 Hana 說一個故事。今晚是新的。

questions.sentence: Grandma lifts the cover of the old book.
questions.question: With the book, what is her action?
questions.explanationZh: lift the cover = 翻開封面 = opens(打開)。今晚要說新故事。

questions.sentence: Tonight she shares an old story.
questions.question: What does Grandma share from the book tonight?
questions.explanationZh: tale = 故事(古字,跟 story 同義,書本裡常見)。

questions.sentence: She tells us a story.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: 按順序:She → tells → us → a → story。loud / fast 是多餘的干擾。

questions.sentence: My ears stand straight up and wait.
questions.question: Listening soon — how am I?
questions.explanationZh: ears up and waiting = 準備好聽。ready = 準備好。

questions.sentence: Grandma holds something old and brown in her hand.
questions.question: What is in Grandma's hand?
questions.explanationZh: 又舊又棕色的東西 = 她那本舊故事書。

questions.sentence: The book is full of paper sheets.
questions.question: Inside, what fills the volume?
questions.explanationZh: paper sheets = 紙張 = pages(頁面)。

questions.sentence: Grandma rests on her old wooden seat.
questions.question: Where does Grandma sit?
questions.explanationZh: wooden seat = 木椅 = in her chair。每晚都是同一張木椅。

questions.sentence: Her face shows no rush or worry.
questions.question: How does Grandma's face look?
questions.explanationZh: no rush or worry = 不急不憂 = calm(平靜)。

questions.sentence: She gives a tiny cough to start.
questions.question: Before speaking, what part does she clear?
questions.explanationZh: tiny cough = 輕咳 = clear her throat(清喉嚨)。說故事前的小動作。

questions.sentence: The cover has faded and turned dark.
questions.question: Which describes the cover?
questions.explanationZh: faded + dark = 又舊又棕。書皮的顏色磨成了深棕色。

questions.sentence: She begins from page one.
questions.question: Which page does she turn?
questions.explanationZh: page one = 第一頁 = the first page。新故事從這裡開始。

questions.sentence: My tail tip trembles in joy for the story.
questions.question: Before the story, how is Mochi?
questions.explanationZh: tail trembles in joy = 尾巴開心地抖 = excited(興奮)。

storyBeat: 故事開始 — 從前一個雨夜

intro.en: The story begins long ago. The night is wet, dark, and loud with thunder.
intro.zh: 奶奶開始說新故事。那是很多年前一個下大雨的夜晚。街上一個人都沒有,只有雨聲和雷聲。

questions.sentence: Grandma says, "Many years back, on a wet evening..."
questions.question: Which phrase did you hear?
questions.explanationZh: many years back = long ago(很久以前)。奶奶的故事都從這開始。

questions.sentence: The rain pours down strong all night.
questions.question: How does the rain fall?
questions.explanationZh: pours strong = 大力下 = hard。雨下得很大。

questions.sentence: No stars or moon are out tonight.
questions.question: Which word fits the night?
questions.explanationZh: no stars or moon = 沒星沒月 = dark(黑暗)。

questions.sentence: The wind blows cold.
questions.question: How does the wind feel?
questions.explanationZh: cold wind = 冷風,讓人 freezing(冷到發抖)。

questions.sentence: The street is empty and dark.
questions.question: Tap the tiles in order.
questions.explanationZh: empty = 空的、dark = 黑的。沒人沒燈,只有雨。

questions.sentence: Thick grey shapes cover the whole sky.
questions.question: Above us, the sky shows what?
questions.explanationZh: thick grey shapes = 雲 (clouds)。整片天都是厚雲,看不見星星。

questions.sentence: Tiny water beads strike the wet road.
questions.question: What hits the road?
questions.explanationZh: water beads = 水珠 = rain drops。一顆顆雨打在柏油路上。

questions.sentence: Not one soul walks the wet road.
questions.question: What mood does the night give?
questions.explanationZh: not one soul = 一個人都沒有 = lonely(孤單)。

questions.sentence: The street lights glow dim and pale.
questions.question: How do the lights look?
questions.explanationZh: dim and pale = 暗又無力 = sad-looking(像在哭)。

questions.sentence: This story happened long, long back.
questions.question: When does the story happen?
questions.explanationZh: long long back = many years ago(很多年前)。奶奶說的是舊故事。

questions.sentence: The street is empty of people.
questions.question: Who walks on the street?
questions.explanationZh: empty of people = no one。下大雨,人都躲在家裡。

questions.sentence: A deep rumble shakes the sky.
questions.question: What rumbling sound comes from the sky?
questions.explanationZh: deep rumble = 低沉的滾響 = thunder(雷)。雷聲滾過天空,讓夜更可怕。

intro.en: A tiny kitten is alone in the rain. She is wet, cold, and hungry.
intro.zh: 故事裡,有一隻小小貓在冷雨中。她的媽媽上週離開後就再也沒回來。她已經兩天沒吃東西了。

questions.sentence: A little cat sits all by herself in the rain.
questions.question: Which word describes the cat?
questions.explanationZh: little = small(小的)。一隻小貓,沒有人陪。

questions.sentence: Her coat of hair is soaked through.
questions.question: Which body part of the kitten got soaked?
questions.explanationZh: coat of hair = 毛 (fur)。雨把她的毛打濕了。

questions.sentence: No food has come to her for a couple of days.
questions.question: How many days without food?
questions.explanationZh: a couple of = 兩個 = two。兩天沒吃了。

questions.sentence: A big shadow makes her shake all over.
questions.question: After seeing the shadow, what is her state?
questions.explanationZh: shiver in fear = 嚇得發抖 = scared(害怕)。

questions.sentence: Her body trembles in the chill.
questions.question: From the chill, what does she do?
questions.explanationZh: tremble = shake(發抖)。太冷了,身體一直抖。

questions.sentence: Her ears press down against her head.
questions.question: How are her ears?
questions.explanationZh: press down = 貼下去 = flat(貼平)。貓害怕時耳朵會貼到頭上。

questions.sentence: Her belly is empty and her body is icy.
questions.question: Body-wise, how is she?
questions.explanationZh: belly empty + body icy = 又餓又冷。兩天沒吃飯,雨又把她淋濕。

questions.sentence: Her eyes stretch open and dart around.
questions.question: How do her eyes look?
questions.explanationZh: stretch open = 睜大、dart around = 警覺地看。

questions.sentence: Her mom went away last week and never came back.
questions.question: Why is she alone?
questions.explanationZh: mom went away = lost her mother(失去媽媽)。上週開始她就一個人了。

questions.sentence: Her belly is empty.
questions.question: Why does her belly hurt?
questions.explanationZh: belly empty = 肚子空。兩天沒進食,肚子在叫。

questions.sentence: She just wants somewhere cozy and not wet.
questions.question: What does she want most?
questions.explanationZh: cozy and not wet = warm dry place(溫暖乾燥)。雨夜裡最簡單的願望。

questions.sentence: She lets out a very small meow.
questions.question: What kind of meow?
questions.explanationZh: very small = tiny(很小的)。她只能發出細細一聲。

intro.en: The kitten finds a narrow alley. She rolls up small to stay warm.
intro.zh: 小貓找到兩面石牆之間的窄巷子。她把身體縮成一團保暖。身邊都是濕石頭的味道。

questions.sentence: She rolls her body into a tight shape.
questions.question: How does the kitten stay warm?
questions.explanationZh: roll into a tight shape = curl(蜷縮成一團)。小貓把自己縮起來取暖。

questions.sentence: She tucks herself where two walls meet.
questions.question: Where does she hide?
questions.explanationZh: where two walls meet = 兩面牆相接 = corner(角落)。

questions.sentence: No one is with her.
questions.question: How is the kitten by herself?
questions.explanationZh: no one with her = alone(獨自一個)。沒有媽媽,沒有同伴。

questions.sentence: A drop of water from her eye slides down.
questions.question: What is on her face?
questions.explanationZh: drop of water from eye = tear(眼淚)。一滴淚從臉頰滑下來。

questions.sentence: The narrow lane is wet and silent.
questions.question: Where is the kitten hiding in the rain?
questions.explanationZh: narrow lane = alley(巷子)。窄窄的小巷,只有雨聲。

questions.sentence: She folds her small feet beneath her belly.
questions.question: What does she tuck under?
questions.explanationZh: small feet = paws(腳掌)。貓蜷縮時的招牌動作。

questions.sentence: Her body forms a round little shape.
questions.question: What shape is her body?
questions.explanationZh: round little shape = a ball(球)。把自己捲成一個小球可以保暖。

questions.sentence: Her heart aches deep inside her chest.
questions.question: How does she feel inside?
questions.explanationZh: heart aches = 心痛 = very sad(非常悲傷)。

questions.sentence: She hopes someone gentle will touch her.
questions.question: What does she wish for?
questions.explanationZh: someone gentle touch = a kind hand(溫暖的手)。

questions.sentence: A damp rocky smell drifts from the corner.
questions.question: In the air around her, what scent?
questions.explanationZh: damp rocky = wet stone(濕石頭)。雨打在牆上的味道。

questions.sentence: She shuts her lids and stays still.
questions.question: Tucked in the corner, what is her behavior?
questions.explanationZh: shut lids + stay still = closes eyes and waits(閉上眼等)。

questions.sentence: Not one person walks past the alley.
questions.question: Who passes the alley?
questions.explanationZh: not a single person = no one。深夜的巷子空蕩蕩。

storyBeat: 大影子靠近 — 是奶奶

intro.en: A big shadow comes near. The kitten shakes. But it is a kind lady.
intro.zh: 一個大大的黑影走進巷子。小貓在發抖。可是那個影子原來是一位頭髮花白、穿長外套、撐著傘的好心阿姨。

questions.sentence: A large dark figure draws nearer.
questions.question: What does the kitten see in the dark?
questions.explanationZh: large dark figure = shadow(影子)。一個大影子慢慢靠近。

questions.sentence: The cat trembles, not sure if it is safe.
questions.question: How does the cat feel?
questions.explanationZh: tremble + not sure = afraid(害怕)。她不知道影子是好人還是壞人。

questions.sentence: It turns out to be a lady, not a beast.
questions.question: Who turned out to be there?
questions.explanationZh: lady = woman(女人)。原來是一位阿姨,不是壞東西。

questions.sentence: Her look is gentle and warm.
questions.question: Looking at her face, how does it seem?
questions.explanationZh: gentle and warm look = kind(親切的)。她的眼神很溫柔。

questions.sentence: A rain shield rests in her hand.
questions.question: What is in her hand?
questions.explanationZh: rain shield = umbrella(雨傘)。她手上撐著一把傘。

questions.sentence: Her steps move with a calm pace.
questions.question: How do the footsteps come?
questions.explanationZh: calm pace = slowly(慢慢地)。腳步聲輕,聽得出對方不急。

questions.sentence: Her hair has turned the color of stone.
questions.question: How is her hair?
questions.explanationZh: color of stone = grey(灰色)。奶奶的頭髮已經白了大半。

questions.sentence: She steps with great care toward the cat.
questions.question: How does she move?
questions.explanationZh: with great care = carefully(小心地)。她不想嚇到躲在牆角的小貓。

questions.sentence: Her eyes carry a gentle light.
questions.question: How does her gaze look?
questions.explanationZh: gentle light = soft(溫和)。她看小貓的眼神像看孫子。

questions.sentence: The shadow is not a monster.
questions.question: What was the dark figure really?
questions.explanationZh: 影子原來是一位好心的阿姨,不是壞東西。

questions.sentence: In order to reach the little stray.
questions.question: Why did she come here?
questions.explanationZh: to find the cat = 來找這隻貓。她聽到了小貓的細聲叫。

questions.sentence: She is dressed in heavy outer clothing.
questions.question: What does she wear?
questions.explanationZh: heavy outer clothing = long coat(長外套)。雨夜出門她穿得很厚。

intro.en: The lady holds her umbrella over the kitten. Her own arm gets wet.
intro.zh: 阿姨走到小貓身邊。她把那把大傘撐在小小濕濕的身體上方。她自己的手臂被雨淋濕了,可是她沒移開。

questions.sentence: The woman spreads her umbrella wide.
questions.question: What does she do?
questions.explanationZh: spread wide = open(打開)。她把傘撐開。

questions.sentence: She places the umbrella above the kitten.
questions.question: Where does she hold it?
questions.explanationZh: above = over(在上方)。傘擋在小貓頭頂。

questions.sentence: The rain stops falling on Mochi now.
questions.question: What does the rain now do?
questions.explanationZh: 故事說 rain stops falling(雨停了不再落下),所以答 stops(停)。

questions.sentence: The cat lifts her face toward her.
questions.question: Where does the cat look?
questions.explanationZh: lift face toward = look up(向上看)。小貓抬起頭看著這位阿姨。

questions.sentence: The woman gives a tender quiet smile.
questions.question: How does she smile?
questions.explanationZh: tender quiet = softly(輕輕地)。她對小貓溫柔地笑。

questions.sentence: The umbrella spreads broad and large.
questions.question: Size-wise, how is the umbrella?
questions.explanationZh: broad = wide(寬的)。傘大得可以蓋住小貓跟自己。

questions.sentence: No more water touches her fur now.
questions.question: In her body, how is the kitten?
questions.explanationZh: no water touches = dry(乾的)。有傘擋著,雨打不到她了。

questions.sentence: Her body relaxes just a touch.
questions.question: Inside, how does the cat feel?
questions.explanationZh: relax a touch = a little safer(稍微安心)。傘下不冷,影子也沒攻擊她。

questions.sentence: Her pulse calms down step by step.
questions.question: How does her heart beat?
questions.explanationZh: pulse calm down = beat slower(心跳變慢)。她不再像剛才那麼害怕。

questions.sentence: The umbrella shields her from the falling drops.
questions.question: For the kitten, the umbrella does what?
questions.explanationZh: shield from drops = cover from rain(為貓擋雨)。傘的工作就是這個。

questions.sentence: Her own arm is in the rain.
questions.question: Whose body part is getting wet?
questions.explanationZh: 她把傘偏向小貓,自己的手臂淋濕了也不管。

questions.sentence: Outside the umbrella, water still pours down.
questions.question: Outside its cover, what falls?
questions.explanationZh: water pours down = the rain(雨)。雨還在下,傘下才是乾的。

intro.en: The lady leans down. She speaks softly and tells the kitten not to fear.
intro.zh: 在傘下,阿姨靠近一點。她壓低聲音,慢慢地、輕輕地說話 —— 像棉花一樣軟。她對小貓說沒什麼好怕的。

leans.zh: 靠近 / 傾身 (第三人稱)

questions.sentence: The woman whispers a gentle "There is nothing to fear."
questions.question: What does she say?
questions.explanationZh: nothing to fear = Do not be afraid(不要怕)。她想讓小貓安心。

questions.sentence: Her tone sounds like cotton.
questions.question: Her tone is like what?
questions.explanationZh: like cotton = soft(輕柔的)。她的聲音像棉花一樣軟。

questions.sentence: The cat keeps her ears open to her.
questions.question: What does the cat do?
questions.explanationZh: ears open = listens(聽)。小貓豎起耳朵專心聽。

questions.sentence: A small heat grows in her chest.
questions.question: After hearing her, how is she warming up?
questions.explanationZh: small heat = a little warm(有點暖)。心裡開始一點點不冷了。

questions.sentence: Her fear has melted away by the end.
questions.question: By the end, fear-wise, where is the cat?
questions.explanationZh: fear melted = not afraid anymore(不再害怕)。溫柔的聲音讓她放心。

questions.sentence: She speaks down low and gently.
questions.question: How does she speak?
questions.explanationZh: down low = in a low tone(低聲)。她特意把聲音壓低。

questions.sentence: Each word comes out calm and warm.
questions.question: How are her words?
questions.explanationZh: calm and warm = slow and kind(慢又溫柔)。她讓小貓有時間理解。

questions.sentence: She gives the kitten a soft promise of safety.
questions.question: What does she promise?
questions.explanationZh: promise of safety = You are safe now(你現在安全)。一句話讓小貓肩膀放下來。

questions.sentence: Her grin curves up softly at the corners.
questions.question: How is her smile?
questions.explanationZh: softly curves up = gentle smile(溫柔的笑)。眼角彎彎,嘴角微微上揚。

questions.sentence: The cat feels heat in the sound of her words.
questions.question: To her ears, the voice gives off what?
questions.explanationZh: heat in sound = warm voice(溫暖的聲音)。

questions.sentence: She does not raise her voice.
questions.question: Does she shout?
questions.explanationZh: stays soft = 保持輕聲。她知道大聲會嚇到貓。

questions.sentence: The sound she gives off settles the kitten.
questions.question: What effect does her voice have?
questions.explanationZh: settles the kitten = makes the cat calm(讓貓平靜)。

intro.en: The lady kneels on the wet road. She asks the kitten why she is alone.
intro.zh: 還在傘下,阿姨把膝蓋放在濕地上跪下來。她對著小貓的眼睛,問她為什麼一個人在外面。

questions.sentence: The woman lowers herself with no rush.
questions.question: How does she go down?
questions.explanationZh: no rush = slowly(慢慢地)。她不想嚇到小貓,蹲下的動作很輕。

questions.sentence: She meets her gaze with the kitten.
questions.question: Where does she look?
questions.explanationZh: meet gaze = look into the cat's eyes(看向貓的眼睛)。

questions.sentence: Her words come out as soft as silk.
questions.question: How is Grandma's voice?
questions.explanationZh: soft as silk = gentle(溫柔的)。

questions.sentence: She gently asks the kitten her reason for being outside.
questions.question: What does she ask?
questions.explanationZh: reason for being outside = Why are you out here(為什麼在外面)。

questions.sentence: No sound comes from the kitten in reply.
questions.question: On reply, what is the cat doing?
questions.explanationZh: no sound = stays quiet(保持安靜)。小貓沒出聲,只是看著她。

questions.sentence: The middle of her legs press on the wet road.
questions.question: What touches the ground?
questions.explanationZh: middle of legs = knees(膝蓋)。她蹲下時膝蓋直接碰到濕地。

questions.sentence: She crouches so she will seem less big.
questions.question: Why does she stay low?
questions.explanationZh: seem less big = look small(看起來小)。蹲低不會嚇到牆角的小貓。

questions.sentence: Her words come out feather-light.
questions.question: How does her question sound?
questions.explanationZh: feather-light = soft(輕柔)。她不想用任何尖銳的字。

questions.sentence: Her eyes hold a wish to look after her.
questions.question: What fills her eyes?
questions.explanationZh: wish to look after = care(關心)。眼神裡是想照顧人的心情。

questions.sentence: The cat closes and opens her eyes with a calm pace.
questions.question: At her eyelid pace — how is the blink?
questions.explanationZh: calm pace = slowly(慢慢地)。貓的「我信任你」訊號。

questions.sentence: She keeps her paws back, no quick move.
questions.question: What does she not do?
questions.explanationZh: does not snatch = does not grab(沒有抓)。她讓小貓自己決定要不要靠近。

questions.sentence: She gives the kitten time to find words.
questions.question: What does she wait for?
questions.explanationZh: time to find words = the cat to answer(等貓回答)。她有耐心,願意等。

questions.sentence: Because of the chill.
questions.question: Why does she shake?
questions.explanationZh: shake from cold = 冷到發抖。雨水讓她全身打顫。

questions.sentence: She cannot speak.
questions.question: What can she not do?
questions.explanationZh: cannot speak = 沒辦法說話。她太怕了,聲音卡在喉嚨。

questions.sentence: She is silent.
questions.question: How is the kitten with no voice?
questions.explanationZh: silent = 沉默的。一點聲音也沒有。

questions.sentence: Soaked, hanging close to the ground.
questions.question: How is her tail?
questions.explanationZh: wet and low = 又濕又垂。尾巴貼在地上,顯得很沒精神。

questions.sentence: She looks at the ground below her.
questions.question: Where does she look?
questions.explanationZh: look down = 往下看。她不敢看奶奶的眼睛。

questions.sentence: The woman has a tiny sack.
questions.question: What does she have?
questions.explanationZh: small bag = 小袋子。她出門總帶著一個布包。

questions.sentence: She takes out a clean piece of cloth.
questions.question: What does she take out?
questions.explanationZh: take out = 拿出來。她從袋子裡找出一條毛巾。

questions.sentence: The towel is clean and dry.
questions.question: How is the towel?
questions.explanationZh: clean = 乾淨的。毛巾沒髒,還是乾的。

questions.sentence: She bends down near to the cat.
questions.question: What does she do?
questions.explanationZh: kneel = 跪。她跪下來,離小貓更近一些。

questions.sentence: Held wide so the cat can step in.
questions.question: How does she hold the towel?
questions.explanationZh: hold it open = 攤開拿著。她把毛巾打開,像在邀請小貓。

questions.sentence: She dries the cat gently.
questions.question: How does she dry the cat?
questions.explanationZh: gently = 輕柔地。她不用力,只是輕輕擦。

questions.sentence: Her hands move unhurried.
questions.question: How do her hands move?
questions.explanationZh: slow = 慢。她的動作慢慢的,不慌不忙。

questions.sentence: The cat begins to feel warm.
questions.question: How does the cat now feel?
questions.explanationZh: warm = 暖。冷雨還在,但她身上開始有了溫度。

questions.sentence: Use force on the cat.
questions.question: What does she not do?
questions.explanationZh: pull or push = 拉或推。她沒硬拉硬推,只是慢慢擦。

questions.sentence: Soon the fur is no longer damp.
questions.question: How is the fur now?
questions.explanationZh: dry = 乾的。沒多久,小貓的毛就不再滴水。

questions.sentence: For a short time she stops to wonder.
questions.question: What does she do?
questions.explanationZh: think for a moment = 想了一下。她停下來考慮要怎麼辦。

questions.sentence: She cannot take the little stray with her.
questions.question: What can she not do?
questions.explanationZh: cannot bring home = 不能帶回家。她有自己的難處。

questions.sentence: The pup at home is not friendly to other furry ones.
questions.question: Why can't she bring the cat home?
options: her house is too small now
her dog does not like new cats
questions.explanationZh: her dog does not like new cats = 她家的狗不喜歡新貓。這就是原因。

questions.sentence: But she has an idea.
questions.question: What does Grandma suddenly have?
questions.explanationZh: idea = 想法。她突然想到一個辦法。

questions.sentence: Her face is warm and gentle again.
questions.question: How does her face look?
questions.explanationZh: kind = 親切的。她想到辦法後,臉上又有了笑意。

questions.sentence: On each evening.
questions.question: When should the cat come?
questions.explanationZh: every night = 每晚。奶奶給了一個固定的時間。

questions.sentence: "I will leave meal for you."
questions.question: What will she leave?
questions.explanationZh: leave food = 留下食物。她答應每天備好一份。

questions.sentence: You are welcome any time.
questions.question: How does Grandma greet the cat?
questions.explanationZh: welcome = 受歡迎的。隨時來都可以。

questions.sentence: Toward where she stands above.
questions.question: Where does the cat look?
questions.explanationZh: look up at = 抬頭看。小貓終於敢看奶奶的眼睛了。

questions.sentence: Fear has left her body.
questions.question: How does the cat feel now?
questions.explanationZh: no longer afraid = 不再害怕。奶奶的承諾讓她安心。

storyBeat: 奶奶說「再講一個小故事」

questions.sentence: Grandma says, "I have just one more tale for you."
questions.question: What does Grandma want to tell?
questions.explanationZh: another = 再一個。奶奶今晚要多講一個小故事給我們聽。

questions.sentence: It is a short story about hot months.
questions.question: In what season is the story?
questions.explanationZh: summer = 夏天。這個小故事發生在熱熱的夏天。

questions.sentence: In the green grass live an ant and a grasshopper.
questions.question: Where do the ant and grasshopper live?
questions.explanationZh: grass = 草。綠綠的草叢裡住著一隻螞蟻和一隻蚱蜢。

questions.sentence: The grasshopper loves to sing.
questions.question: How does the grasshopper feel?
questions.explanationZh: love to sing = 喜歡唱歌。蚱蜢整天開開心心地哼歌。

questions.sentence: They live as one in one field.
questions.question: How do they live?
questions.explanationZh: together = 一起。螞蟻和蚱蜢住在同一片草地上,是鄰居。

storyBeat: 夏天蚱蜢唱歌,螞蟻工作

questions.sentence: The grasshopper sings all day.
questions.question: What does the grasshopper do?
questions.explanationZh: sings all day = 整天唱歌。蚱蜢一邊跳一邊唱,玩個不停。

questions.sentence: The ant works very, very long days.
questions.question: How does the ant work?
questions.explanationZh: work hard = 努力工作。螞蟻一趟一趟搬東西,從早忙到晚。

questions.sentence: The ant carries food to her home.
questions.question: What does the ant carry home?
questions.explanationZh: food = 食物。螞蟻一粒一粒地把食物搬回家存起來。

questions.sentence: For making music side by side.
questions.question: What does the grasshopper want?
questions.explanationZh: 蚱蜢想找螞蟻一起玩,一起唱歌,不想一個人。

questions.sentence: The ant says, "I cannot. I must save food for winter."
questions.question: How is the ant?
questions.explanationZh: save food for winter = 為冬天存糧。螞蟻沒空玩,她在為以後做準備。

questions.sentence: Winter comes. The grass is no longer here.
questions.question: What happens to the grass?
questions.explanationZh: gone = 不見了。冬天一到,綠草都枯了,什麼都沒了。

questions.sentence: Not a bit.
questions.question: How much food does the grasshopper have?
questions.explanationZh: no food = 沒有食物。夏天只顧唱歌,現在什麼都沒存到。

questions.sentence: He is cold and hungry.
questions.question: How does the grasshopper feel in winter?
questions.explanationZh: hungry = 餓。蚱蜢又冷又餓,在雪地裡發抖。

questions.sentence: The ant is warm and full inside her home.
questions.question: How does the ant feel?
questions.explanationZh: warm and full = 又暖又飽。螞蟻夏天的辛苦,讓她現在不怕冬天。

questions.sentence: Grandma says, "The ant was wise. The grasshopper learned."
questions.question: What is the lesson?
questions.explanationZh: wise = 有智慧的。奶奶輕輕說:該玩的時候玩,該準備的時候也別忘了準備。

storyBeat: 奶奶說「再聽一個小故事」

questions.sentence: Grandma says, "Just one more tale this evening."
questions.question: When is the story?
questions.explanationZh: tonight = 今晚。奶奶輕拍膝蓋,還想再講一個小故事。

questions.sentence: Long ago, the north wind and the sun could not agree.
questions.question: What did they do?
questions.explanationZh: argued = 爭吵。很久以前,北風和太陽吵起來了:誰才是真正的強者?

questions.sentence: Both said, "I am stronger than you."
questions.question: How do the wind and sun feel?
questions.explanationZh: stronger = 比較強。兩個都不服輸,各自喊著自己最強。

questions.sentence: Then they saw a wanderer on the road.
questions.question: Who did they see?
questions.explanationZh: traveler = 旅人。路上正好有個人經過,他們決定拿他來比一比。

questions.sentence: He wore a warm coat.
questions.question: How was the traveler?
questions.explanationZh: wore a warm coat = 穿著暖外套。旅人裹得緊緊的,準備走他的路。

questions.sentence: The north wind sends cold air very, very fast.
questions.question: What does the wind do?
questions.explanationZh: blows = 吹。北風使勁吹,要把外套吹掉。

questions.sentence: The wind is cold and full of force.
questions.question: How is the wind?
questions.explanationZh: strong = 強的。風又冷又強,可是用力不一定有用。

questions.sentence: The traveler holds his coat tight.
questions.question: How does the traveler hold his coat?
questions.explanationZh: tight = 緊緊地。風越吹,旅人越把外套抓得更緊。

questions.sentence: He wraps it close to himself.
questions.question: Where does he wrap it?
questions.explanationZh: around = 環繞、包住。他把外套裹在身上,風吹不進來。

questions.sentence: The wind cannot win.
questions.question: How does the wind feel?
questions.explanationZh: cannot win = 沒辦法贏。風吹得再大也拉不下外套,只好認輸。

storyBeat: 太陽溫暖,旅人脫了外套

questions.sentence: Now the sun begins to glow softly.
questions.question: What does the sun do?
questions.explanationZh: shine = 發光、照耀。換太陽出場了,他不用力,只是慢慢照亮路面。

questions.sentence: The air is cozy and soft.
questions.question: How is the air?
questions.explanationZh: warm = 溫暖的。空氣不再冷颼颼,旅人放鬆了。

questions.sentence: The traveler takes off his coat.
questions.question: What does the traveler do?
questions.explanationZh: takes off = 脫下。他自己把外套脫了 — 太陽沒拉,他自己想脫。

questions.sentence: Glowing with a glad face.
questions.question: How does the traveler feel?
questions.explanationZh: smiles = 微笑。陽光暖暖的,旅人臉上有笑容,腳步也輕了。

questions.sentence: Soft ways carry the day.
questions.question: What is the lesson?
questions.explanationZh: gentle = 溫和的。奶奶輕輕說:有時候溫柔比用力更能讓人心打開 — 就像她對 Mochi 和 Hana 一樣。

questions.sentence: A wish for sweet sleep.
questions.question: What does Grandma say?
questions.explanationZh: goodnight = 晚安。睡覺前說的。

questions.sentence: She shuts the old book.
questions.question: What does she do with the book?
questions.explanationZh: close = 關上、合上。故事說完了。

questions.sentence: It is late.
questions.question: How is the hour now?
questions.explanationZh: late = 晚了。月亮已經高。

questions.sentence: Hana is drowsy on the floor.
questions.question: How does Hana feel?
questions.explanationZh: sleepy = 想睡的。Hana 趴在地上眼睛快閉了。

questions.sentence: The candle is almost gone.
questions.question: What is happening to the candle?
questions.explanationZh: out = 熄了。蠟燭快滅了,表示夜深該散。

questions.sentence: I leap down from the wall.
questions.question: What do I do?
questions.explanationZh: jump down = 跳下來。我從矮牆跳下,動作輕。

questions.sentence: The street is hushed now.
questions.question: How is the street?
questions.explanationZh: quiet = 安靜的。夜深街上沒人。

questions.sentence: I walk back to my corner slowly.
questions.question: Which way does Mochi walk?
questions.explanationZh: Mochi 慢慢走回 (walk back) 自己睡的角落,所以答 back(往回)。

questions.sentence: I am warm inside.
questions.question: How do I feel inside?
questions.explanationZh: warm inside = 心裡暖。聽完故事像吃飽一樣。

questions.sentence: See you the day after this night.
questions.question: When will I be back?
questions.explanationZh: tomorrow = 明天。我明晚還會來奶奶院子。

questions.sentence: Outer scene words
questions.question: Tap the pairs
questions.explanationZh: outer scene 四個詞:stray 流浪、yard 院子、tale 故事、kind 善良。Mochi 是流浪貓,每晚到 yard 聽奶奶說 tale。

questions.sentence: Main story words
questions.question: Tap the pairs
questions.explanationZh: main story 四個詞:rain 雨、cold 冷、umbrella 傘、scared 害怕。雨夜小貓的核心字。

questions.sentence: Aesop words
questions.question: Tap the pairs
questions.explanationZh: Aesop 短篇關鍵詞:ant 螞蟻、winter 冬天、sun 太陽、wise 有智慧的。

questions.sentence: Grandma told a story about a rainy night.
questions.question: What did Grandma tell tonight?
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶今晚說的是雨夜小貓 + 螞蟻 + 北風太陽的故事。

questions.sentence: Will Mochi come back tomorrow?
questions.question: Will Mochi come back?
questions.explanationZh: Yes — 我每晚都會再來。明天還有新故事。
